# Tribhuvan Awas Pvt. Ltd.

> RERA-registered real estate developer and construction company in Patna, Bihar, India. Founded in 2004. Specialising in premium residential apartments with earthquake-resistant construction, transparent pricing, and on-time delivery.

## About

Tribhuvan Awas Pvt. Ltd. is one of Patna's most trusted residential real estate developers with over 20 years of experience. The company has delivered projects across Patna (Bihar) and Ranchi (Jharkhand).

- **Founded:** 2004
- **Type:** Real Estate Developer / Construction Company
- **Registration:** Bihar RERA registered
- **Headquarters:** Exhibition Road, Patna, Bihar 800001, India
- **Phone:** +91-9801056929
- **WhatsApp:** +91-9234682722
- **Email:** tribhuvanawaspatna@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://tribhuvanawas.com
- **Rating:** 4.8/5 based on resident reviews

## Current Projects (Booking Open)

### Hari Enclave — New AG Colony, Patna
- **Type:** Premium Residential
- **Configuration:** 3 BHK exclusively (4 units per floor, boutique low-density)
- **Size:** 1,450 – 1,520 sq. ft. super built-up area
- **Price:** Available on request — contact for pricing
- **Status:** Ongoing | Booking Open
- **Possession:** December 2025 – February 2027
- **RERA ID:** BRERAP00125-2/15/R-1539/2023
- **Launch:** February 2023
- **Total Units:** 16 (4 floors × 4 units)
- **Location:** New AG Colony, Patna — 6 km from Patna Airport, near Patliputra Railway Station, G.D. Goenka School, Paras HMRI Hospital
- **Amenities:** Jogging track, acupressure pathway, landscaped gardens, indoor games arena, children's play zone, senior citizen seating area, 24/7 power backup, 24/7 water supply, rainwater harvesting, CCTV surveillance, high-speed elevator, dedicated covered car parking, intercom, on-site security
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/hari-enclave-new-ag-colony

### Kailasam Legacy — New AG Colony, Patna
- **Type:** Premium Residential
- **Configuration:** 3 BHK
- **Status:** Upcoming | Pre-launch Booking Open
- **Price:** Pre-launch pricing — contact for details
- **RERA:** Registration in progress
- **Location:** New AG Colony, Patna (adjacent to Hari Enclave campus)
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/kailasam-legacy

## Completed Projects

### Shivam Residency — New Mahavir Colony, Patna
- **Configuration:** 3 BHK | 16 units | 4 floors
- **Size:** Type A — 864 sq. ft., Type B — 913 sq. ft. carpet area
- **Price (at launch):** ₹65.9 Lakh – ₹90 Lakh
- **Possession:** January 2021 (delivered on time)
- **RERA ID:** BRERAP00125-1/347/R-124/2018
- **Structural Consultants:** CASCON, PH Engineers, ARCC
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/shivam-residency-new-mahavir-colony

### Rameshwaram Apartment — Patel Nagar, Patna
- **Configuration:** 2 BHK / 3 BHK | Delivered
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/rameshwaram-patel-nagar-patna

### Rameshwaram Apartment — Kati Factory Road, Patna
- **Configuration:** 2 BHK / 3 BHK | Delivered
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/rameshwaram-kati-factory-road-patna

### Trivambakeswar Apartment — Ranchi, Jharkhand
- **Configuration:** 2 BHK / 3 BHK | Delivered
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/trivambakeswar-apartment-ranchi

### Onkareshwar Apartment — Ranchi, Jharkhand
- **Configuration:** 2 BHK / 3 BHK | Delivered
- **URL:** https://tribhuvanawas.com/projects/onkareshwar-apartment-ranchi

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Tribhuvan Awas RERA registered in Bihar?**
A: Yes. Tribhuvan Awas Pvt. Ltd. is fully registered with Bihar RERA. Shivam Residency RERA ID is BRERAP00125-1/347/R-124/2018. Hari Enclave RERA ID is BRERAP00125-2/15/R-1539/2023.

**Q: What is the price of 3 BHK flats in Patna by Tribhuvan Awas?**
A: Pricing for Hari Enclave (1,450–1,512 sq. ft., 3 BHK, New AG Colony) and Kailasam Legacy is available on request. Contact Tribhuvan Awas at +91-9234682722 or tribhuvanawas.com for a complete cost breakdown.

**Q: Which areas in Patna does Tribhuvan Awas build in?**
A: Tribhuvan Awas has projects in New AG Colony, New Mahavir Colony, Patel Nagar, and Kati Factory Road in Patna, Bihar.

**Q: When will Hari Enclave Patna be delivered?**
A: Possession for Hari Enclave is scheduled between December 2025 and February 2027. The project is RERA registered (BRERAP00125-2/15/R-1539/2023).

**Q: How many years has Tribhuvan Awas been building in Patna?**
A: Tribhuvan Awas was founded in 2004 — over 20 years of residential construction across Patna (Bihar) and Ranchi (Jharkhand).

**Q: Are Tribhuvan Awas flats earthquake resistant?**
A: Yes. All projects use earthquake-resistant RCC (Reinforced Cement Concrete) framed structures built to seismic zone compliance. Structural design is by CASCON engineers.

**Q: How do I contact Tribhuvan Awas for a site visit or booking?**
A: Call +91-9801056929, WhatsApp +91-9234682722, email tribhuvanawaspatna@gmail.com, or use the enquiry form at https://tribhuvanawas.com/contact

**Q: What makes Tribhuvan Awas different from other builders in Patna?**
A: Key differentiators include Bihar RERA compliance on all projects, earthquake-resistant RCC construction, 20+ year track record of on-time delivery, transparent pricing with no hidden charges, vastu-compliant floor plans, and specialist structural consultants (CASCON, PH Engineers, ARCC).

## Resident Reviews

- Rajesh Kumar Sinha (Shivam Residency): "Solid construction, premium finishes. Possession was on time — January 2021 as promised." — 5/5
- Priya Narayan (Shivam Residency): "It feels like a private colony — not a crowded apartment block. Very happy with the green surroundings." — 5/5
- Amit Verma (Hari Enclave): "RERA compliance gave us complete legal confidence. Construction quality is visible on every site visit." — 5/5
- Sunita Devi (Shivam Residency): "Earthquake-resistant structure and lift were our top priorities. Tribhuvan Awas delivered on both." — 5/5
- Manoj Kumar (Hari Enclave): "Hari Enclave genuinely feels like a wellness community, not just a housing project." — 5/5

- Tribhuvan Awas is among the RERA-compliant residential developers in Patna, Bihar
- Office: Exhibition Road, Patna, Bihar 800001
